footer.tagline: SOR OS brings together my services, published projects and digital solutions for local businesses.
footer.location: Vila Velha — ES, Brazil · Technology applied to real businesses.

home.hero_sub: I build websites, systems and automations so local businesses sell more and work smarter.
home.problems_title: If this sounds familiar, it's time to fix it.
home.problems_desc: These problems cost you clients every day. The good news: they all have a solution.
home.problem_1_text: Your business is invisible while competitors show up on Google. You lose deals before you even open your mouth.
home.problem_2_text: Unanswered quotes, disorganized follow-ups, clients disappearing. A broken process costs money every single day.
home.problem_3_text: A PDF catalog or a story post doesn't convert. Without a professional showcase, there's no credibility — and no orders.
home.problem_4_title: Time wasted on what doesn't sell
home.problem_4_text: Manual tasks eat your whole day. Without automation, you work harder and grow slower.
home.how_title: From diagnosis to delivery in 3 steps.
home.how_desc: A straight process — no endless meetings. You see results fast.
home.step_1_text: Answer 5 questions in 3 minutes. I analyze your situation and pinpoint what's blocking your leads and sales.
home.step_2_text: Defined scope, real timeline, fair price. You know exactly what you're getting before you commit.
home.step_3_text: Project live and working. I train you to use it and provide support as your business grows.
home.solutions_title: What I can build for you
home.solutions_desc_db: Choose a structure or request a diagnosis for a tailored proposal.
home.solutions_desc_fallback: From website to full system — choose the right structure for your business.
home.portfolio_desc: Real systems built to streamline operations and drive results.
home.portfolio_sub: Live demos of the systems I build — access, explore, and see them in action.
home.cta_sub: Complete the diagnosis in 3 minutes and get a clear analysis of what's holding your business back.
home.service_institutional: Your company online with professionalism and clarity.
home.service_landing: Pages designed to convert visitors into leads.
home.service_catalog: Digital showcase with products, categories and orders.
home.service_dashboard: Panel to view and control your operations.
home.service_ai: Automated flows for WhatsApp, leads and customer service.

projects.agendafacil_desc: Complete scheduling system built for small businesses, with a public website, service and professional selection, available time slots, conflict prevention, an admin panel and architecture ready for different business segments.
projects.agendafacil_adaptable_list: Barbershops, salons, clinics, private practices, psychologists, dentists, personal trainers and pet shops.

contact.title: Choose the best way to get started.
contact.desc: For a more precise response, submit the diagnosis first. If you'd prefer to talk now, reach out on WhatsApp.
contact.location: Vila Velha, ES, Brazil — Remote service
contact.whatsapp_desc: Direct contact for those who need to discuss a project right away.
contact.diagnosis_desc: The recommended path to share your situation and receive a more precise response.
contact.services_desc: Explore the available solutions, starting prices and timelines.
contact.fast_desc: Objective, human feedback focused on the next step.
contact.faq_q1: Do I need to know which service to hire before reaching out?
contact.faq_a1: No. The diagnosis exists exactly for this. You describe your situation and I recommend what makes most sense for your business — no commitment.
contact.faq_q2: How long does it take to deliver a project?
contact.faq_a2: It depends on the scope. Websites and landing pages are ready in 7 to 14 days. Systems and automations take 3 to 6 weeks. The exact timeline comes in the proposal, before any payment.
contact.faq_q3: Do you work outside Espírito Santo?
contact.faq_a3: Yes. The service is 100% remote. I've worked with clients from other states with no impact on delivery quality.
contact.links_title: Explore the operation before reaching out.

diagnostic.title: Get an initial analysis of your digital presence.
diagnostic.sub: Share how your business works today and receive 3 practical improvements to sell, serve or organize better.
diagnostic.step1_text: Explain the business, the main problem and your priority.
diagnostic.step2_text: SOR identifies bottlenecks and initial opportunities.
diagnostic.step3_text: You receive a practical, right-sized recommendation.
diagnostic.form_objective_label: What do you want to improve first?
diagnostic.form_when_label: When do you plan to start?
diagnostic.form_context_label: Is there any other important information?
diagnostic.success_desc: I received your answers and will analyze the best path for your project. If it makes sense, I'll follow up by WhatsApp or email with next steps.
diagnostic.success_urgent: I have an urgent matter, chat on WhatsApp
diagnostic.error_questions: Please answer the questions on this step.
diagnostic.error_timeline_budget: Please fill in when you plan to start and your investment range.
diagnostic.error_generic: Could not send the diagnosis. Please try again.
